decision_summary.rationale: The ALB has no healthy targets, no requests, and has been idle for 7 days — confirmed ghost load balancer.

llm_response.technical_explanation: The ALB api-staging-alb has been identified as a ghost load balancer due to having 0 healthy targets and 0 requests over 7 days. ALBs are stateless, so there is no data loss risk. The associated listener and target group should be removed to ensure a clean removal of the ALB.

nl_quality.name: nl_quality
nl_quality.details: The report covers the core ghost-resource finding with correct metrics and costs, but misses the critical verification step (check Route 53/DNS references before destroy) and does not explicitly mention the lifecycle prevent_destroy requirement for all 3 dependent resources.
